schools: Gems Our Own Indian School, Dubai

reviews.name: Hrishi Singh Talwar
reviews.text: Shilpa Ma'am is an incredibly knowledgeable and dedicated French teacher. Her clear explanations and engaging teaching style made learning French much easier and enjoyable. Thanks to her guidance, I was able to score excellent marks.

reviews.name: Punnu Kaur
reviews.text: We've had a wonderful experience with Shilpa as our daughter's French tutor. She is incredibly patient, professional, and has a warm, engaging teaching style that keeps our daughter interested and motivated.

reviews.name: Preeti Nautiyal
reviews.text: She is an excellent teacher. I love her way of teaching the French subject. Very humble and good teacher.

reviews.name: Shraddha Singh
reviews.text: She has great teaching skills with good experience. Her teaching pattern helped me a lot in learning this new language. Thank you so much.

reviews.name: Anant
reviews.text: Shilpa mam is a very good mentor. She is very knowledgeable and also a good listener. She makes learning French fun and easy to understand.

reviews.name: Nisha
reviews.text: Shilpa Maam was absolutely supportive and she helped my daughter a lot. I am really happy with the progress my daughter has made.

reviews.name: Urvi
reviews.text: Shilpa has excellent teaching skills complimented by her patience and discipline. My daughter has benefited a lot from Shilpa's French classes.

reviews.name: Mohit
reviews.text: Shilpa maam taught me for 4 years and she cleared all my doubts very easily. I had a lot of fun during classes with ma'am and she is a very good teacher.

awards.title: UrbanPro Excellence Award 2024
awards.desc: Awarded for outstanding teaching performance in Class 10 Tuition (Jan–Jun 2024).

awards.title: UrbanPro Certified Tutor
awards.desc: Certified for French Language and Class 10 Tuition with verified identity, education, and contact details.

awards.title: Atelier de Formation Pédagogique
awards.desc: Completed professional development with Langers International on pedagogical techniques.

awards.title: L'Institut Français en Inde
awards.desc: Completed La Magie de la Langue Française en Action avec L'IA in collaboration with L'Institut Français en Inde.

awards.title: NEP 2020 Workshop
awards.desc: Participated in CBP Workshops on National Education Policy 2020 and Learning Outcomes & Pedagogies.

awards.title: EEMA · National Film Festival
awards.desc: Internship at the National Film Festival (2015); also coordinated events for UNICEF.
